quoted_language: The accompanying financial statements have been prepared assuming the Company will continue as a going concern. As discussed in Note 2 to the financial statements, the Company has suffered recurring losses from operations and has a net capital deficiency that raise substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern.
reasoning: The auditor explicitly states there is 'substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern' without any mitigating language about management's plans alleviating the doubt. This is a formal PCAOB AS 2415 going-concern opinion modifier.
